env.AVAILABLE_PLATFORMS: appletvos appletvsimulator driverkit iphoneos iphonesimulator macosx watchos watchsimulator xros xrsimulator
env.INFOPLIST_KEY_NSCameraUsageDescription: Please enable the camera function so that the Pamilihan Peso app application can obtain image information for a better experience and better service
env.INFOPLIST_KEY_NSContactsUsageDescription: Please enable the contacts function, so that the Pamilihan Peso app can obtain contact information, get better experience and better service
env.INFOPLIST_KEY_NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInU: Pamilihan Peso app needs to assess whether your account has a security risk or determine whether it is a real location based on your account login location. Pamilihan Peso app may also recommend excellent personalized products and services to you through location information.
env.INFOPLIST_KEY_NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDe: Pamilihan Peso app needs to assess whether your account has a security risk or determine whether it is a real location based on your account login location. Pamilihan Peso app may also recommend excellent personalized products and services to you through location information.
env.INFOPLIST_KEY_NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescrip: Please enable the photo album function so that the Pamilihan Peso app can obtain image information for a better experience and better service
env.INFOPLIST_KEY_NSUserTrackingUsageDescrip: Accessing these identifiers will provide you with better services and a better experience, and provide you with a customized experience. You can turn it off at any time by going to "Settings" - "System Privacy".
